title: Incognito: The Secret Lives of the Brain
author: David Eagleman
themes: The Brain as a Team of Rivals
The Neuroscience of Blame and Responsibility
excerpt: Most of what your brain does happens beneath the radar of your conscious awareness. David Eagleman takes us on a mind-bending tour of the hidden subroutines that drive our behavior, revealing that the conscious mind is just the tip of an enormous neural iceberg.
